entry.title: Re: How to manage Workflows for Sales Price in SAP S/4HANA ?
entry.content:
Hello @KartikShah 

Is the condition table created with release status? You can check that in V/05. If the "with Release Status" checkbox is not ticked, then workflow will not work correctly.

Kind regards,

Roberto

entry.title: Re: Archiving - How it is designed, how does it work
entry.content:
Hey, 

Are the archived objects still available in Analytics (reports / dashboards)?

entry.title: Re: Impossibile to deliver CBFD Deliv.Free of Charge and...
entry.content:
Hello,

When dealing with sales orders of type CBFD (Delivery Free of Charge) and SD2 (Replacement Delivery Order), you may encounter issues where these orders do not appear or are not processed correctly due to stock-related challenges.

Solutions

  1. Correct Application Usage:

    • For CBFD - Delivery Free of Charge orders, ensure you are using the correct application, such as ‘Manage Sales Orders Without Charge’ (App ID F2305) 2796935 - [Public Could] Sales Orders of type CBFD - Deliv.Free of charge are not visible in the Manage Sales Orders App (App ID F1873) instead of the standard ‘Manage Sales Orders’ app (App ID F1873).

  2. Check Material Availability:

    • Perform an availability check on your material using SAP’s availability checking features. This will help you identify any missing components that might be causing the issue. You may need to bring the missing materials into stock.

  3. Stock Transfer or Purchase Order:

    • If the required stock for fulfilling these orders is not available, consider creating stock transport orders or purchase orders to replenish the stock.

  4. Technical Setup Verification:

    • Ensure that your SAP system is configured correctly concerning stock, delivery, and order types. Sometimes, issues may arise due to misconfigured setups.

Considerations

  • Make sure the material numbers and plant codes are correctly assigned to the orders and are consistent with the stock held in your system.
  • If stock is still unavailable after internal checks and setups, cross-verify if there are any stock reservations or allocations that are preventing the fulfillment of these orders.

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: Re: Smooth Transition Ahead: SAP Enable Now Migration from SAP BTP Neo to SAP BTP, Kyma runtime
entry.content:
Thx for your prompt feedback Kristina!

Can you send me the link to the Consultant workzone by Mike so I can request access?

KR, Maggy

entry.title: Blog It Forward - Lluis Salvador
entry.content:
It’s been a real honor to receive the #BIF from @Raquel_Pereira_da_Cunha , one of my first mentors in Solution Manager (#solman) and a great friend, despite the distance. Thank you so much, Raquel

Let's start with a brief introduction
My real name is Luis but everyone in SAP world know me as Lluis, I break #SAP solutions by day, build community by night, and somewhere in between, I clean corruption in Viladecans city 😁.

I’m a naturally curious person who loves understanding how things work and figuring out how we can make them better. These days, my biggest passions revolve around technology, teamwork, and building strong communities.

Professionally, I began my journey as an #ABAP developer back in early 2004. Since then, I’ve moved through several areas like SAP Solution Manager, SAP Support processes, SAP PartnerEdge, Enable Now, Tricentis, Cloud ALM and now discovering WalkME. I’m lucky to work with a dedicated and talented team, helping companies improve their processes with #ALM solutions. Solving tough challenges is something I genuinely enjoy.

After that #ABAP phase, one day I suddenly found myself in a Support/Solution Manager team, working on a task requested by SAP. With barely any information and a massive volume of data. I started asking questions in the old SCN forums. I really asked a lot,a lot..., and got a huge amount of help from the SAP Communitty.
Step by step, I started meeting great people and true SAP experts. The first ones who really made an impact were @Raquel_Pereira_da_Cunha, Wences @wlacaze , @TomCenens  ,and @Vivek_Hegde  .
They just opened the doors of the SAP Community for me. I met most of them later at SAP events, and many more great people inside the communitty, and thanks to their support, I kept connecting with more experts and incredible SAP influencers.

That experience helped me grow both technically and personally. It even took me to Manila in the Philippines to conduct an on-site PCOE audit, and later to Argentina to launch an international collaboration for PCE Support Services, all while running various projects with #solman at the core. It also motivated me to contribute back to the SAP Community as much as my time allows.

From ManillaTaking Lunch in ZambiaTo Argentina
The best place to atten an on-site Audit from #SAPFirst Solution Manager in Zambia (Africa)Where the International journey of a global PCOE started

I’d also like to say a few heartfelt words to @david_ruizb , @enric101 , Imma, Losel @starverso, and of course, my lovely Mireia. You’re more than just friends, you’re part of a little family built around a shared passion called SAP Inside Track Barcelona. Year after year, #SITBCN has grown into something truly special, and it wouldn’t be the same without each of you. I’m especially grateful to @david_ruizb  for opening the door and inviting me into this incredible community. Thanks to that, I’ve not only learned and grown professionally, but I’ve also found people who inspire me and make this journey so much more meaning.

Outside of work, I love diving into new technologies and ideas, one of my current obsessions is exploring how local governments could embrace decentralization and community-driven innovation. That’s what led me to create The WatchCans, a local initiative designed to bring neighbors together to spark change in our city through creative and fun quests.

At the end of the day, I’m just someone who enjoys learning new things, connecting people, and experimenting with tech projects, while also relaxing with some good old-school trading card games as a classic UW control player. During the pandemic, I got curious about #smartcities technologies expecting flying cars and AI-powered recycling bins. But what I found instead was... a black hole. A swirl of flashy PowerPoint decks, endless buzzwords like “sustainability,” “resilience,” and “digitalization,” and public funds mysteriously disappearing into pilot programs that no one remembered six months late. In the end, most of those initiatives seemed less about real impact and more about fueling political narratives, just rebooting the same cycle of “innovation” meant to “improve” quality of life, without ever addressing the real issues on the ground.

What I thought would be a tech-driven journey into the future became a crash course in how local governments often miss the mark. That wake-up call pulled me closer to municipal politics and eventually led me to create a citizen-led network, an online space where neighbors who genuinely care about their city can take real, collective action.
Nowadays, we need technology more than ever but we also need to make it human, accessible, and rooted in purpose. Not just another platform for professionals, but a tool that empowers everyone; I hope the SAP can affort this in the future. In the end, I came to a simple but powerful conclusion, the smartest thing a city can invest in isn’t a new gadget or app it’s in its people. Empowered, connected, and willing to collaborate for better local policies…

'It Is simply people who are the real drivers of lasting change.'

Here are a couple of photos showing a few more hobbies that, from time to time, help me disconnect from all the SAP overload, non-SAP, non-Viladecans moments:

Magic The Gathering trading card games offer a great escape from real life, a moment to immerse yourself in a fantasy world of strategy and tactics that keeps your mind sharp without needing to us /hNot as much as I’d like due to my current physical condition, but hiking snowy mountains is where you truly feel alone with nature, with no other goal than reaching the end of the trail and pushing your mental limits.

Following the previous question, I’d like to share some AI-generated images that more or less capture how I’ve discovered the true power of the SAP community over the years where I can say that I really enjoy this journey, just meeting people in real live.

Let's go for BIF questions

If you were 20 again, what would you study?
It’s funny to say I might be stretching the limits of this question, but after 21 years working with SAP, I can confidently say I’d still choose to study computer science and work as a SAP consultant. Having the chance to be involved in big business decisions has been incredibly enriching and fulfilling.

What is the best lesson your parents taught you?
Sadly, I didn’t have the chance to learn many formal lessons from my parents, but something I’ll never forget is the focus and energy they put into fighting for their goals, even when life wasn’t on their side. No one else has shown me that kind of consistency and determination to keep pushing forward and pursue their life purpose, no matter the obstacles.

What do you enjoy most in your work and why?
One of the things I enjoy most about my current job is growing alongside a team, facing challenges together, working on different projects, and sharing a common goal. Over the years, I’ve had the chance to grow with amazing colleagues, some of them are still part of my team, others have moved on, but each of them, in their own way, brought valuable experiences that helped me see things from new perspectives and learn new skills.

Share an interesting/funny story related to your product
A very funny thing about working with SAP is that nothing is really impossible; everything is technically doable if your imagination is wild enough… and directly proportional to the amount of custom code you’re willing to write. 😄
A few years ago, someone told us that in a single Solution Manager instance, we’d only be able to manage around 10 customers as a VAR partner. Sounds reasonable, right ? Well, we ended up onboarding more than 300 customers' SAP infraestructture , it worked smoothly, and, with not too much custom code.
Now the question is… will we be able to pull off something similar in #Cloud ALM ? Challenge accepted.😉

Recommend resources of information that helped you in your work
If anyone would ask me about about a great resource, definitely I will recommend SAP Community, there is any resource better than this can put you in contact with the correct person when you need it, you can learn with SAP Learning HUB, you can get professional support from SAP Services, you can know people through social media, but the big one is definitely SAP Community; live is all about you contact networks, SAP Community must be the main branch of it.

What do you imagine or predict is the future of your topic? (Mobile, Cloud etc., be creative be daring, be entertaining)
I’m not really a Nostradamus when it comes to predictions, but there’s something I’ve been thinking about lately. With all the progress around #AI, I have the feeling that something big is coming, something we’re not seeing clearly yet… and maybe we won’t until it’s already here.
Right now, I still see a lot of companies needing classic developers. There’s tons of custom code out there, and adapting it to fit business processes is still part of our daily work. But let’s be honest, this won’t last forever. #AI is learning fast, and it's not just about writing code or writing e-mail, it’s starting to understand patterns, generate solutions, and even make decisions or take actions.
I see tools today that can do in minutes what used to take us hours. And while that’s amazing, it also makes me wonder where does that leave us as professionals ? Or even more, as humans ?
I think we’re heading toward a time where technical skills alone won’t be enough. What will matter most is our ability to adapt, to connect with others, to bring creativity, empathy, and real value beyond just executing tasks.
And yeah… in a future full of #AI agents and robots taking  control of the citizens, I won’t lie. I’m a bit worried 😅
But I also believe that if we stay curious, keep learning, and focus on what makes us human, we’ll still have a very important role to play following #SAP strategy … 

This is a great example of how we support each other in the SAP Community, even when we get blisters from walking around Heidelberg streets 🙂

To continue with the #BIF, I’d like to mention two people I really appreciate, even if we’re far apart one is @DanielMateo and the other is @Shiroh44

I’ve had the chance to meet Dani in person and share experiences with him, and as a professional, I’d like to ask him this question: "How do you survive when SAP keeps shifting our journey to new products?"
Because let’s be honest, keeping up with SAP’s evolution isn’t always easy !		On the other hand, I’m also very happy to mention Shiro from #Japan. Even though we’ve never met in person, I’ve had the chance to connect with him through social media and some SAP communitty events. It’s amazing how SAP brings people together from all over the world, it's not just about Europe, and I’m genuinely curious to hear the kind of insights Shiro can share from his experience in Japan with SAP
@DanielMateo @Shiroh44

I’m truly honored to be part of this community now as a little Champion. Huge thanks to @NilPeksen for thinking of me and to everyone behind the scenes or cheering quietly, your support doesn’t go unno.
Thanks for this opportunity to reflect and share part of my journey. #SAPhas given me not just a career, but also a global community and that’s something truly valuable.

Whether it’s through #SAP, or just helping a neighbor debug life, I’ll keep doing what I do best, learning, sharing, and having fun along the way.

Looking forward to reading the next stories in this Blog It Forward chains.

entry.title: Re: Sales Order Approval Workflow | Navigation to the app...
entry.content:
Hello,

You can try the following. If it does not help, you may not be able to configure the Related Apps. 

Role and Authorization Check: Ensure the user has the correct roles and authorizations for both My Inbox and Manage Sales Orders - Version 2 applications.

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: Re: Customer maintenance of your PO Responsible and contact that receives the CPI notification

Hello.

entry.title: Re: Data Attribute Recommendation - 500 Internal Server Error when Inferencing
entry.content: Hi, I would suggest opening an incident on the CA-ML-DAR component (see https://help.sap.com/docs/data-attribute-recommendation/data-attribute-recommendation/getting-support). In this way, the team will be able to investigate the issue and support you.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Launchpad "Cannot load tile"
entry.content: Thank you sir this one help me

entry.title: Re: 关于 SAP 公有云（S/4HANA Cloud）的销售数据锁定
entry.content:
您好，

在SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public Edition) 中，为了在某个特定时间段内自动锁定销售数据的创建和修改，可以考虑以下方法：

使用业务锁定功能

在SAP系统中，业务锁定是常用的方法，此功能允许您锁定特定组件或模块，在指定锁定期间限制用户操作。

锁定步骤

  1. 配置模块锁定:

    • 您可以创建工作流事件或配置锁定业务交易代码（如VA01, VA02, VF01）。
    • 配置业务锁定以避免用户在指定的时间段内进行不必要的操作。

  2. 使用工作日历:

    • 创建工作日历以规定特定时间段内事务处理的限制。
    • 设置定期的工作日历来限制每月1日至3日的销售单据的创建和修改。

财务结账控制

对于财务结账期间的实施，确保财务凭证的锁定时间与业务锁定时间分开控制，可以通过以下方式进行细分设置。

锁定操作：

  • 期限锁定：通常使用’锁定期间的物料过账日期’，确保财务在规定期间后的正常过账不受影响。
  • 单据锁定：设置条件以防止在月结期间的物料单据创建、修改。

通过上述的锁定策略，确保在汇总期间和财务结账期间对销售数据的创建和修改进行自动控制，避免汇总结果受到人为干扰。

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: Re: ASP.NET Report Viewer & multiple IIS Worker Processes
entry.content: Just to add/clarify... a report with no parameters exports every time without issue.

entry.title: Document Number Range Issue for Prior Year Posting – SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
We are facing an issue in SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud related to document number range while posting Journal Entries for the previous Financial Year (2023-24).

→ Document Type: [Mention Document Type]
→ Number Range for FY 2023-24: Starts from 87
→ Number Range for FY 2024-25: Starts from 14

Issue:
When we post Journal Entries for FY 2023-24, the system is wrongly picking the current year number range starting from 14 instead of continuing from 87. Earlier, before opening the previous year period, it was correctly picking 87 series.

Request:
Kindly check and help us to correct this issue so that:

  • FY 2023-24 postings pick number range 87

  • FY 2024-25 postings pick number range 14

entry.title: Automate Document Uploads with SAP Signavio Process Governance & Microsoft SharePoint
entry.content:
Stop juggling platforms! SAP Signavio Process Governance now integrates with Microsoft SharePoint, allowing you to automatically upload documents directly from your workflows. This new feature streamlines document management, ensuring everything is secure and accessible within your governance processes. A key use case is governing and uploading process-relevant documents to Microsoft SharePoint. This blog post will walk you through the setup and execution from three perspectives:

  • the Admin configuring the connection
  • the Modeler embedding the Microsoft SharePoint action in the workflow
  • the End User uploading the document.

 

Admin User Flow

Microsoft SharePoint Administrator

1. Register a new Microsoft Entra-App and Document ClientID (Application ID) and Tenant ID for later

2. Create a Client Secret

Go to “Certificates & Secrets” and create a client secret and copy it for later

3. Assign API Permissions

There are two ways to do this and you need to align with your Microsoft SharePoint admin:

A) Grant the app full read and write access to all SharePoint Sites of the tenant (Scope: Sites.ReadWrite.All)

B) “App-only access”: Give only access to an individual site (Scope: Site.Selected)

This requires an additional app to grant our app access to the selected site via Graph API or PowerShell. Often there is an app/script available within the company to do this, please reach out to your SharePoint admin. If this is not the case, here is a tutorial how to do this. Please ensure that the Application has only API write access to the required SharePoint Page. To keep this tutorial simple, we continue with the full access scenario (A):

Go to “API permissions” --> “Add a permission” --> “Microsoft Graph” --> “Application permissions” -->  “Sites.ReadWrite.All” –> “Add permission” 

Click “Grant admin consent for <tenant name>”

SAP Signavio Process Governance Administrator

Prerequisites:

  • Microsoft Entra-App created and credentials are available
  • workspace administrator access rights

Steps

1. Create a new Configuration in SAP Signavio Process Governance

Open the Organization Settings by clicking on the User Profile menu in the top right corner of the header area.

2. Create Credentials

Click on “Credentials” to create a new set of credentials to authenticate against Microsoft SharePoint

Click on “Create credential” and enter the parameters from the Microsoft Entra ID App:

  • Username = Client ID from Microsoft Entra ID application
  • Secret Value = Client Secret from Microsoft Entra ID application

You can find more information in SAP Help.

3. Configure the SharePoint File Upload activity

Go to “Activities”, select the “SharePoint File Upload” activity and click “Add configuration”:

Configure the activity:

  • SharePoint Tenant: obtain from Microsoft Entra Portal or SharePoint Admin
  • SharePoint Site: Copy the URL of the site where the file should be uploaded. Typical pattern: https://<tenant>.sharepoint.com/sites/<sitename>
  • Credentials: select the credential you created before
  • Drive: A storage location where users can upload files. Options available in drop down list after selection of the SharePoint tenant, site, and credentials.
  • Base path: list of folders from the drive field. This will be the root folder for the modeler to select a folder for uploading the documents.

You can find more information for the remaining fields in SAP Help.

Test, enable and save the configuration.

 

Modeler User Flow

Prerequisites:

  • SharePoint File Upload Activity is configured and enabled

Steps: 

1. Create a new process/workflow with a form trigger

2. Add a “File” field to the form

Add a “File” field to the form and name it “Files to Upload”. Change the name of the button to “Upload files” to make the action more explicit:

3. Add SharePoint File Upload activity

Go to “Actions” tab and select “External Activities”. Select activity “SharePoint File Upload” and the configuration you created before:

4. Configure activity in workflow: Inputs

Specify the target folder based on the base path set in the configuration and map the files to be uploaded to the field form the form “Files to Upload”

You can find more information in SAP Help how to configure the activity.

5. Configure activity in workflow: Outputs

Create a new field “results” and link it to get access to the response from SharePoint after the file upload (e.g. to get the URL to the uploaded file)

6. Check results

Add a “User Task” action after the SharePoint activity to check the result and display the URL of the uploaded item

7. Publish the process

 

End User Flow

Prerequisites

  • Workflow is created and published

Steps

1. Start a new case for the process/workflow

2. Select documents and trigger upload to SharePoint

3. Optional: Check Case History

Optionally, you can check the case history and see that the upload was invoked, executed and the user task “Check Results” was created. This step is not needed for the actual upload.

4. Check User Task to see result

Open the User Task to check the result and obtain the URL of the uploaded document:

5. Open link and verify in SharePoint

Streamlining your document workflows just got easier with the new SharePoint integration in SAP Signavio Process Governance. We hope this guide has clarified the setup and execution process. Explore this new functionality and let us know your feedback in the comments below! Stay tuned for more exciting updates coming soon.

 

Further Resources:

  • SAP Help Portal: SharePoint File Upload
  • SAP Enable Click-Thru Demos:
    • Administrator
    • Modeler
    • End-user

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud: cannot access Feed.Color for line chart
entry.content:
I want to create a line chart for comparing different versions as differently colored lines. I'd like to assign these versions to the chart via scripts using addMember(Feed.Color, version_name). This did however not work for me, and it turns out that getMembers(Feed.Color) always returns an empty list for line charts, even though the color feed is clearly being used in the builder and the chart is showing differently colored lines.

Using getMembers(Feed.ValueAxis) on the line chart does correctly return the Measures used and using getMembers(Feed.Color) on a heat map also works as expected. Is there some special way the color feed is handled for line graphs?

Thanks in advance. Kind regards,
Paul

entry.title: Re: Using Restrictions to Enhance User Authorizations in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition
entry.content:
Dear Expert, 

I am confused about restrictions in the Public Cloud. In my case, I made a restriction for Role A (Create Purchase Requisition) and applied a restriction for Authorization Group - Product Group A. This role is worked. However, when I applied for the additional role B (Display Batch Information Cockpit), the restriction in role A wasn't working anymore. So, the user is still able to access Product Group A. Please give your advice

entry.title: Re: SAP Walkme and SAP Enable Now
entry.content:
Hi, I have the same question and 5 months later I still can't find any Roadmap. Is there anything that would give us clarity on the Enable Now future?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: QM Manage Usage Decision - field Scrap/ Reverse UD
entry.content:
Hi experts,

How to setup Information pop-up window in case of filled field Scrap in Manage Usage Decision. 

Sometimes is happened the Quality Engineer fills in field Scrap by mistake, and make Usage decision. If he want to reverse this UD, it's not possible. We want to display Info Message, or some Question message for this field. How to do it.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Error message when I use in enable now the function “...
entry.content: hi Woflgang - What's the issue after you tested the API and the fix, I'm facing a similar problem.

entry.title: TS Supply Optimizer - Demand Fulfillment Rate calculations on business logs
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

I need help to understand how the Location Demand Fulfillment Rate and Total Demand Fulfillment Rate that are shown in the business logs are calculated, since I can't find any info in the help portal. 

In our model we don't have any customer demand, we only have independent demands. So the input key figure for the optimizer is the INDEPENDENTDEMAND, while the delivered amount per period should be reflected in the INDEPENDENTDEMANDSUPPLY. Also, we run the optimizer by subnetwork.

I thought the formula was as simple as: (INDEPENDENTDEMANDSUPPLY / INDEPENDENTDEMAND) * 100

For some subnetworks that we have, this formula seems working fine. But for other subnetworks I'm finding huge discrepancies, so I'm not so sure I'm considering the right key figures anymore.

To give an example, for one subnetwork I'm seeing these data in the business logs: 

-Amount missing: 1,115,774 (for both total and location, in this example they appear to be the same but I found many other cases were they re not)

Then if I go in the template, filtering by that subnetwork ID, and checking the total amounts of INDEPENDENTDEMAND and INDEPENDENTDEMANDSUPPLY (selecting the same planning scope of the optimizer run), I see these number: 

-INDEPENDENTDEMAND: 98,641,645

-INDEPENDENTDEMANDSUPPLY: 98,058,986

Then the missing amount should be only:  582,659 

I can't find where the other missing amounts come from. Has anyone ever had the same issue? 

Thank you in advance for the help,

Regards,

Luca

SAP Integrated Business Planning for sales and operations SAP Integrated Business Planning for Supply Chain

entry.title: Re: Recruiting Groups per legal entity
entry.content: Thank you, Alejandro. Do I need one job requisition template per legal entity if I have one recruiting group per legal entity?

entry.title: Re: Schedule Update of Down Payment Status - Sales Orders
entry.content:
Hello Henk.

Beside the solution proposed by Raf, here's the FI-CA solution. Creation of down payment requests works as described by Raf. During clearing of the request by a payment, you can use a FI-CA event like 0020 (focus on the clearing) or 0010/0030 (new document, i.e. the down payment / credit) to remove the delivery block.

BR,
Sascha

entry.title: SAP Sales Cloud V2 Data Import-Create Error : "Operation failed. Please contact the support team."
entry.content:
In my SAP Sales Cloud Version 2, on a "Call List" entity record, I have 5 "Call Participants" of Contact type. I deleted 4 of them and tried to "import-create" (Settings --> Import and Export Data) the same Contacts through an EXCEL file.
I followed the SOP by downloading the Latest Calllist Participants Template, added the data that I got through the Export of records on Call List before deleting the contacts. Created a zip file of EXCEL. But I am constantly getting an error as "Operation failed. Please contact the support team." I even tried to import-create individual EXCEL file and also CSV file of UTF-8 type.
Even in Documentation, it asks to raise a case when this error is displayed. 
I am attaching my Screenshot below.If anyone could help me with this issue, it would be a great help.

SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 @SAPSupport

entry.title: Re: Email Notification Functionality for PO in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
@swadhinata ,

We have done Email Configurations for Purchase Order . When PO is created mail should trigger to suppliers and internal users along with PO attachments.

Here my issue is suppliers are receiving mails along with attachments but internal users are  receiving mails but there is no attachment.

Internal users should receive mails along with PO attachment.

Please provide me the solution.

Thanks

Veera Vani Muddala.

entry.title: Re: SAP Document Management System (DMS) for SAP S/4HANA Cloud and On Premise
entry.content:
I have come across a strange feature in DMS for HANA on premise.

First, the landscape:

- legacy SAP ECC system with SAP DMS in use for the 'classic' scenario of storing drawings and plans for products

- HANA system with SAP DMS in use for the same scenario.

- A content server (OpenText Archive Center) with retention enabled for the content repository which is used for storing the actual DMS documents.

Under ECC, when testing, absolutely no problems when I update the attachment in SAP DMS, the new document version gets created and stored (as a separate document, not an updated version; OT AC can handle versions in documents, but there's no SAP product using it in archivelink) in the content repository without any problem

Under HANA, when updating an attachment, the new document gets created (again, new document ID), but then, SAP tries to physically delete the old version from the repository, which will not work as the original version had retention applied to it.

Is this actually a new feature, and if yes, is this documented somewhere or is there a OSS note on this topic?

entry.title: Re: CU50 in internal tables
entry.content:
I used the 2 options. "Continue after commit" alone doesn't work but the option "not BI Session" allows me to implement my SHDB until the end.
the problem is when I select my characteristics. I can do it when I record but we cannot see it in the generated code. Some characteristics can have multiple values.
This is the last obstacle. For the rest I understood :
I need to create an enhancement allowing me to store the values I want in a Z table. Then I read my data from the table after the call transaction.

entry.title: Re: Automated Update of open Sales Orders in case of Avai...
entry.content: To the best of my knowledge, it is not possible to run BOP every time the availability situation changes. It can be rather scheduled as a periodic job, that runs for example, once per hour and updates all sales orders. In my opinion, it wouldn't be an efficient approach to run it each time there is an availability change.

entry.title: Re: Schedule Update of Down Payment Status - Sales Orders
entry.content:
Hello Sascha,
Thanks a lot for this valuable addition.
Best Regards,
Henk Hoogerbrug

entry.title: Re: Email Notification Functionality for PO in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
@veeravani :  I believe you want to CC an internal user while sending the PO output to the supplier. 

Please check and implement BADI- BADI - APOC_ADD_EMAIL_RECIPIENTS in Custom Logic app.

entry.title: Re: Question: Is ABAP performance tracing (ST12) still a...
entry.content:
Dear HermannGahm,

Performance will always be a topic of analysis and discussion. Even today, with advanced tools available for developing code, we can still make mistakes that are specific to our scenarios and can cause performance issues. Such problems need to be analyzed by developers with the help of tools and find do the RCA. With BTP ABAP Cloud and S/4 cloud in picture we are mainly using ADT tools for performance analysis. At times we additionally do use HANA tools (Plan viz) to understand the issues with the modeling of CDS. But now personally I rarely use SAP GUI based tools.

Regards

Vishal

entry.title: Re: ABAP Dump LIST_TOO_MANY_LPROS:Modify Screen.
entry.content:
You can find the solution with an internet search.

Where possible use "LEAVE TO SCREEN ..." instead of "CALL SCREEN ..." in your programs.

entry.title: Send emails by type
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I would like to know if it's possible the following:

If an employee has 2 types of email (Professional and Perssonal) registered on the system and he has an administrative position where does approvals in some workflow requests, is it possible to send the email notifications of workflows to their Professional email, but when he finalize for example their performance evaluation, receive this performance notification on your Personal email?

In other words, when the email notifications its about the Company x Employee relationship, the emails needs to be sent to your Personal email, but when the email notifications its about Management/Administrative process, the emails needs to be sent to your Professional email.

I thanfull your help.

 

Kind Regards

JC

entry.title: Pay component required on Decimal to publish in EC
entry.content:

We have a US based client performing Annual Salary Increase. There are 238 worksheets which includes 14k employees, all worksheets are in completed stages. Now client is asking that all Pay components must be published including decimal, which was not at initial time.

Client refused to delete the worksheets.

What possibilities here to configure in backend.

@xavierlegarrec

entry.title: Q2 Onboarding Webcasts for SAP Field Service Management
entry.content:
Are you a new SAP Field Service Management Customer ready to start your project implementation?

To ensure a successful start to your SAP project, we’ve designed a Customer Onboarding Journey dedicated to SAP Field Service Management.

Join the Q2 Onboarding Webcasts!

The Onboarding Webcasts are live sessions designed to get you up to speed with the onboarding process. Plan, register, and join these sessions to gain insights and clarify any questions you may have. If you can't join live, on-demand content is also available.

Figure 1: Onboarding Journey - Q2 Webcast Roadmap.

entry.title: Re: Why the expiry date of SF "Certified Professional" in...

Hi @imlty00 @aufeab

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Datasphere CDS View live modelling
entry.content:
Within our SAP Datasphere we are interested in providing live insights and reducing data footprint (nothing unusual so far). However, therefore we need to import remote tables based on CDS Views.

Unfortunately, when trying to select typical CDS Views like I_JOURNALENTRYITEM which would be a perfect fit for live data based on remote tables these views are not displayed when chosing remote tables within our system as they miss required annotation.

 

For modelling purposes based on live views it would be easiest to have CDS Views which are based on the table only and are kind of a table wrapping CDS View for further modelling in Datasphere.

With the link below it is easy to identify the views that are based on an object (e.g. a table).

Cloudification Repository Viewer

However, there is mostly no wrapping view that can be used in datasphere on the table directly.

Most likely it behaves the same for other customers as well as it should be a common use case that modelling based on live data is preferred over replication and modelling is easier when adressing a table or view that displays the tables cells.

Do you have any hints for me or is it really required that every customer creates his own CDS Views based on the table with the required annotations for live modelling?

Thank you very much in advance

entry.title: Subscription Failed Error for SAP Build Work Zone in BTP Trial Account
entry.content: I am currently working with SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition, in my BTP trial account. However, I've encountered a "Subscription Failed" error while attempting to subscribe to this application. The error message indicates that I need to link an Identity Authentication tenant to the subaccount with the "Establish Trust" option. I've attempted to subscribe multiple times, but the issue persists. I would appreciate your guidance on how to resolve this error. Thank you for your assistance!

entry.title: Re: Why the expiry date of SF "Certified Professional" in Credly is not updated after Stay
entry.content:
Hi @tpraveenkumar 

Thank you for your engagement and posting this very important question.
This looks like a new question. I would like to encourage to used our SAP Learning Q&A section  and post your new question there.

This makes it easier  to follow-up:
That way other learners can benefit from the answer:
If you ask the question there other learners  can search for it in the future if they run into the same issue and there we have more features available for responses

Would you mind to repost it ?

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Error when using Background Processing Framework in S...
entry.content:
@JiriNovak2 

When you are working with RAP, the set_operation method should be used instead of the set_operation_tx_uncontrolled method. Additionally, make sure to trigger BGPF in the save_modified method.

https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-concepts/scenario-transcational-controlled

entry.title: Re: Delivery date calculation with Custom Calendar in Sal...
entry.content: Already you have some custom calendar in sale order and wondering why, again you are looking for user exit to overwrite that.  If that custom calendar is not required, make it blank.

entry.title: Migration of Remaining Budget
entry.content:
Hi All,

I need to migrate remaining budget for around 500 projects from excel sheet . All these project budget are on ECC system & need to migrate to S4 Hana private edition . We can not connect these 2 system ( ECC to S4 hana ) and subsequently need to download all these details from ECC & upload to new system ( S4 Hana ) . If we need to develop any custom program , can anyone please suggest any API /BAPI etc .

Thanking you very much for your support as usual . 

Best Regards

Mohammed

entry.title: Re: Error message when I use in enable now the function “...
entry.content:
Hwllow

answer to Kart12

The authorisations for the user of the interface between Cloud ALm and Enable Now must be correct. When testing the API, we realised that not everything was set correctly.

entry.title: SAP EWM RFUI Outbound Picking Screen Warehouse Order Validation Issue.
entry.content:
The t-code /SCEM/RFUI is being used for Outbound-Picking.

This screen having many validations based on Warehouse Order & Handling Unit. But there is no any validation for warehouse number, if we are putting wrong Warehouse Number (Like HU number in WO field) the program going to an error/dump.

I have checked the screen, it seems the field is having conversion routine APLH0 (CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPH0_INPUT), Which is calling just after hitting enter after giving wrong WO. The conversion routine not able to convert the wrong data and throwing dump.

This is happening because both the Bar Codes (WO & HU) are placed close to each other. The end-user often doing this mistake to scan wrong bar code.

I tried to put validation on screen level properties but did not find anything relevant. I also tried to write a code PAI but the above routine calling before the any other code and throwing dump.

Can anyone assist me to put a validation for wrong warehouse number and system will throw an error message.

entry.title: Intercompany invoices in RE-FX
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Do you know is there an official SAP recommendation (or what is your experience from practice) how to deal with intercompany lease invoices in RE-FX?


Regards

entry.title: Renewed Server Certificate - SQLA Client fails with "The TLS handshake failed, error code 0x2000051d
entry.content:
We have an instance of SQLA running version 17.0.11.7821 which has been making HTTPS calls for a few years now without issue then today, one endpoint we connect to renewed it's certificate and ever since then we have been getting TLS errors. 

We use a generic function to call the webservice

CREATE PROCEDURE "DBA"."postHttp"( in "endPoint" long varchar,in "version" long varchar,in "type" long varchar,in "headers" long varchar,in "postData" long varchar ) 
url '!endPoint'
set 'HTTP(EXCEPTIONS=off; !version)'
type '!type' header '!headers'

Which we call from different procedures passing the url etc as parameters.

We DON'T define a certificate and, on Windows at least, has always meant that the OS Cert Store is used to validate certificates. 

Connecting using postman on the same server works fine, again using the OS Store, with no certificate errors so I know the OS Store is validating servers certificate. 

I have rebooted the server in hope it might force SQL to refresh it's connection with the OS's Cert Store, but it didn't help.

How can I force SQLA to refresh it's view of the OS certificate store when validating?

entry.title: Re: Batch Job does not trigger replication to C4C
entry.content: @mracantonius1 Unfortunately not, however its a very simple method to call. Please check the method parameters

entry.title: Re: IBP Interface table /IBP/MARC_EXT upload logic
entry.content:
Hi Sam,
This is the documentation of Material Master Data integration: Materials | SAP Help Portal

You can fill MARA_EXT and MARC_EXT in two ways:
- using: transaction /IBP/ECC_INT_MAT
- using BTE, which is automatically collecting and transform changed and newly-created materials online whenever the master data is updated in SAP ERP. This is done using a business transaction event (BTE). Docu for BTE configuration: Setting Up the System Infrastructure | SAP Help Portal

You have a possibility to modify the data with BAdI, custom code: Using Business Add-In Implementations > 
/IBP/ECC_SAVE_MATERIAL

I hope above information helped in better understanding.
Br,Melinda

entry.title: Extend Auto Logout time for ecplise ADT with SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello All,

we are facing in our development enviroment by using ADT with ecplise that - developer get auto logout after 5 mins of inactivity. 

Is there any way to change this? (We wrote SAP already on this but they mentioned that it's set automatically to 30min for ABAP session time out, so that ADT has to relogon.)

However this is somehow not the case for us, wondering if there are other settings which might impact this behavior?
Many thanks for your help!

entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics Canvas Reporting
entry.content:
I have a Canvas report that shows all employees who have booked time off (any time type) for May 1st, however, I would prefer to have it show all employees who have not booked time off on that date. Anything I try will only show employees who have booked time off for a time that's not May 1st. 

Is there a way to get it to not show users who have booked time off on that date, but show every other user

SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics

entry.title: Re: Extend Auto Logout time for ecplise ADT with SAP Public Cloud
entry.content: The 5-minute auto-logout issue in ADT/Eclipse, despite SAP's 30-minute ABAP session timeout, likely stems from Eclipse/ADT-specific workspace or project settings, aggressive network (firewall/proxy/load balancer) timeouts, restrictive OS settings, or SAP system configurations beyond the ABAP timeout (like ICM or Gateway parameters). Troubleshooting involves isolating the issue, monitoring network traffic, simplified testing, and comparing configurations with working environments, requiring collaboration with SAP Basis and network teams to identify the overriding setting.

entry.title: Ability to take picktures of damage upon receipt and send to the shared drive

entry.title: SAP PS Public Cloud Budget
entry.content:
Hello Dear Colleagues,

My name is Gizem Kaya, and I am a PS Consultant.
I am currently working on a project where we are using the Public Cloud, and budgeting is required for our projects.

I created a project using the Project Control – Enterprise Projects app. The project ID is 25.TEST.02, and the second-level WBS element is 25.TEST.021.

After creating and approving the project, I go to the “Import Financial Plan Data” app, where predefined templates are available. I download the Project Budget template and fill it out as shown in the attached file.

Once I upload the data, the system confirms a successful upload. Then, when I check in the “Display Financial Plan Data” app, the data appears correctly — as shown in the attached screenshot.

However, this data does not reflect in the “Project Budget Report” app.

Could you please advise what steps I should take to resolve this?

Thank you very much for your support.
Best regards,
Gizem Kaya

entry.title: Re: Standalone As-Built Configuration in SAP ME - Excess...
entry.content: Hi! I guess you will not be able to use Plugin-related services. Looks as if RemoveComponentServiceWSService is the only service for you. So you need to play with its methods. It should work with the data returned by RetrieveComponentsServiceWSService. So, if if those 2 services are not sufficient to resolve your task, then it might be an error in the Remove method or a missing API - then you can submit a support ticket..

entry.content:
Hi All,

I need information regarding the implementation of the "Treasury Executive dashboard" app. The OData service(/SSB/SMART_BUSINESS_RUNTIME_SRV) and UI5 application(SACINTEGS1) are already in active state in the system. However, as mentioned in the Fiori Apps Library, it is a public cloud-based app. Is there any way to integrate this app with an on-premise system?

entry.title: Re: Standalone As-Built Configuration in SAP ME - Excess...

Thank You @sergiy_katerinich, I have used the RemoveComponents PAPI which is working fine, I need to execute a scenario for the excess qty and validate.

Thanks for your Support!

Appreciate it! 👍

entry.title: Re: Low-cost,Mdm cost & High Cost in App - Purchase Requi...
entry.content:
Hello Dipak,

enclosed you will find a short summary of the fields.

 

  1. low-cost

Meaning: The Low-cost field indicates that the costs of the respective purchase requisition process are classified as low. This often refers to the value of the purchase requisition or the amount of work required to process it.

Usage: You would use this field to identify requisitions that are low cost or low effort. It could help to process less critical requisitions faster, making the whole process more efficient.

 

  1. mdm-cost (master data management cost)

Meaning: The Mdm-cost field shows the costs incurred by master data management. These are the costs incurred for the maintenance and management of master data (such as supplier and article master data) used in the purchase requisition process.

Usage: This field is used to analyze how much costs are incurred under management of master data. These can be caused by the creation, maintenance, updating and cleansing of data. If these costs are high, this could indicate inefficient master data management processes that could be optimized.

 

  1. high-cost

Meaning: The High-cost field indicates that the costs of the purchase requisition process are classified as high. This can be caused by high values of the purchase requisition or by more complex processes that require more time and effort.

Usage: This field is useful for identifying requisitions that require special attention due to their high cost or effort. These may be expensive items or purchase requisitions with more complicated approval processes. A detailed analysis of these requisitions can help improve efficiency or identify expensive processes that should be optimized.

 

Best regards

Dennis

entry.title: Re: Migration cockpit - different approach shown for same...
entry.content:
I get the same error when not using my S-User account but another one...here the stepts but the main thing is the update:

Resolution

  1. Implement SAP Note 3452059 - Incorrect Migration Approach for Project in Different Client, SAP S/4HANA Migration Object Modeler in your system.
  2. After implementation, open the migration project in target client and use the option from menu bar (Goto -> Use Project in Different Client).

entry.title: SIT and UAT Tests Scripts in S4HPC project

Dear Colleagues,

to develop some WRICEFs is the correct approach? 

which are the SAP BP to do developments respective the clean core approach?

Thanks a lot, Maurizio

entry.title: Workflow rules in SAP Cloud for Customer
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a requirement . In the Workcenter Ticket, when the status of a Ticket is , suppose 'XXX' , then we need to send the Reminder Emails to the customer. And this email should be send once per week . So i have created a scheduled workflow rule and here according to an event selected, we can set the time offset and decide when to send the Email. But i cant see an option to send the Emails once per week ( For example, if i need to send these reminders once per every week for 3 months ) . So are there any other ways to send a reminder  email to the customer once per every week depending on the status of the ticket? Please let me know if you have any other suggestions.

entry.title: Re: STO in Sourcing and Procurement
entry.content:
Hello,

See the attached summary on the subject of intra and inter company, as well as the corresponding Fiori apps. As I don't know how you currently work or what exactly you want to do, I have only described this superficially.

  1.  intra-company STO (within the same country or company)

- Domestic: No VAT on transfers within the same company. No tax is due as long as the transfer remains within the same legal entity.

- Cross-border: For cross-border transfers within the same company, import VAT and customs duties must be taken into account. The receiving plant pays import VAT and customs duties must be processed via SAP GTS.

  1.  inter-company STO (between different legal entities)

- Domestic: For transfers between different legal entities within the same country, VAT is charged as it is a sales. The sending company charges VAT, the receiving company deducts input VAT.

- Cross-border: For international inter-company transfers, export duties and import VAT must be taken into account. Customs clearance is carried out via SAP GTS and VAT is calculated according to local tax laws.

Important points:

- Transfer prices must be configured correctly for inter-company transactions.

- Customs duties, import VAT and tax regulations must be observed for cross-border transfers.

 

How to proceed:

- Check and adjust material master and tax code.

- Configure tax key and account determination for taxes.

- Set up transfer prices for inter-company transactions.

- Set up customs clearance for cross-border transfers.

- Check purchase orders and goods receipts and tax calculation.

- Use tax reports and VAT returns to check tax calculations.

Summary of the relevant Fiori apps:

- Manage Material Master - Manage material master data and tax codes.

- Manage Tax Codes - Manage tax codes and tax keys.

- Create Stock Transport Order and Monitor Stock Transport Orders - Create and monitor STOs.

- Post Goods Receipt - Post goods receipt and check tax calculations.

- Monitor Customs Declaration and Create Export Declarations - Customs clearance for cross-border transfers.

- Configure Intercompany Billing and Manage Billing Documents - Transfer pricing management for inter-company transactions.

- Display Tax Returns and Display Sales Tax Reports - View tax returns and VAT reports.

 

Best regards 

Dennis

entry.title: Fiori app to get a supplier confirmation and to create a ASN
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a requirement to get an online supplier confirmation without using an EDI or a supplier collaboration tool. Is there a standard fiori app that we can share with the supplier where he can see the run time information, for example he should be able to create an ASN or inbound delivery and should be able to see what quantity has been received by the customer etc.

Can anyone suggest if there is a standard Fiori application available? or shall we go for the custom application?

Regards,

I'm just wondering if anybody knows the reason for this. 

It's not causing any harm, I just want to keep the OU structure nice and neat in Manager.

Thank you,

Andrew

entry.title: In S/4HANA 2023, can we write script using screen personas for the UI changes of standard Fiori app.
entry.content:
Hi All,

Is it possible to add script to mask the UI field information for standard Fiori application using screen personas.. whereas using Adopt UI, we cannot write script. I know screen personas can be used to customize the GUI applications. but from HANA2022, screen personas are built with Adopt UI.

So is there possibility to add the script using screen personas for the standard Fiori application.

entry.title: SAP-Ariba Back up and Restore tests
entry.content: We have an ogoing SAP-Ariba periodic review and us, customer, obviously cannot do back up. When and how is the back up and restore test being done by SAP? I need to confirm when was latest back up from (what date), when was the latest restore test from (what date), and actions needed. Thanks!
